creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #11)
> Here's a new patch that makes the upstream patches local to the port.
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #12)
> 3 separate patches.

That's too drastic, in my opinion. Let's just change the checksum again -- that'll buy me a month or so to upgrade the port...

Thank you!
